name: protokol-lab
description: Protokol Lab — protocol tracking, macro analytics, and AI coach.

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix client && npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix marketing
scripts.heroku-postbuild: npm install --prefix marketing && npm run build:ui --prefix marketing && npm prune --omit=dev --prefix marketing && npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client && npm run build --prefix client
scripts.test: npm test --prefix server && npm test --prefix client
